item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 897
item.description:
1

16

19
20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Alan Boyce
"Be aware that a halo has to fall only a few inches to be a noose." - Dan McKinnon So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Dump of satisfying things. Enjoy !
item.description:
Man attracts thousands of chicks with a verbal cue. Wish I could ....
And the happiness continues.
A young man blushes as Slovenian rock climber and Olympic champion Janja Garnbret stumbles off the wall and straight into his arms.
Bottle trend.
A mother pictured her twin babies every morning while they were fast asleep.
Gros bisous.
The purest bond in the world.
Place is known for saucy Fries.
Smooth tidy collection of turf from edge of road soothes my soul.
Using heavy artillery to shoot at unstable snow, causing a controlled avalanche.
Nikolas Plytas Pump Foil.
Personal dirigible flights.
This dude knows how to improvise.
Outjerked ... This is not satisfying, nor legal ... It's a stupid joke, don't do that.
The Mina Unirea salt mine in Slănic, Romania. Not the first time on imgur, but still awesome.
Watching five trains passing by at the same time in Tokyo.
In China, there are 3d portrait studios that take pictures of you and 3d print it.
Bartender disarms guy with a knife using tables and chairs.
The fastest attack in the animal kingdom belongs to the peregrine falcon, at 390 km/h.
Huang-ling Village, China
Cleaning this blocked culvert.
That's a big Loggerhead.
That came out of nowhere ...
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: GovBrief Today #524
item.description: A federal judge pried loose the $5.8 million Donald Trump has owed E. Jean Carroll for three years and told him it's time to pay. Judge Lewis Kaplan wrote that Trump "has been stalling this case for years." A unanimous jury found he sexually abused and defamed Carroll, every appeal failed, and the Supreme Court declined to hear the case without a single dissent. Carroll is 82. Kaplan ordered the money out of escrow and wrote that it's time for Trump to "do equity." The courts weren't done telling him to accept their decisions today. An appeals court refused for the second time to put his name back on the Kennedy Center, where he had placed it without authorization. A tarp has covered the sign for 25 days, and the judge who ordered the name removed is demanding to know why it's still up. I've emailed 8,150 stories over 524 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260708-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/syria-terror [2] https://go.govbrief.today/ukraine-patriot [3] https://go.govbrief.today/afone-turkey [4] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-july8 [5] https://go.govbrief.today/deere-repair [6] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-sign-kenctr [7] https://go.govbrief.today/dugan-sentencing [8] https://go.govbrief.today/carroll-payout [9] https://go.govbrief.today/new-memphis-shooting [10] https://go.govbrief.today/pool-defendants [11] https://go.govbrief.today/shooting-harris-da [12] https://go.govbrief.today/rehear-birthright [13] https://go.govbrief.today/beshear-mcconnell [14] https://go.govbrief.today/freedom-fuel [15] https://go.govbrief.today/smithsonian-defends-mission [16] https://go.govbrief.today/minn-rent [17] https://go.govbrief.today/texas-tech-sued Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: United Airlines must face lawsuit over 'window seats' that lack windows
item.description: https://www.reuters.com/legal/government/united-airlines-must-face-lawsuit-over-window-seats-that-lack-windows-2026-07-06/ "U.S. District Judge James Donato in San Francisco rejected United's defense that "window" referred to the location of a seat relative to the cabin wall and ​aisle, and that the carrier never contractually promised that seats in ​the window position would have views outside." Yeah no, if it says window seat, we expect to see a window right there next to the seat. Not a window-less wall. Picture is a random old meme I used
item.dc:creator: YoWilykat

item.title: Everyone says they're joking right up until the punchline starts showing up at fucking rallies.
item.description: Nothing says "it's just a joke, bro" quite like spending 45 minutes explaining why saying racist shit is actually a sophisticated exercise in free speech. Funny how the people demanding infinite context for a joke suddenly lose all interest in context when discussing literally anything else. "We can't joke anymore!" My brother in Christ, comedians are still selling out arenas. The issue isn't that people can't tell racist jokes. It's that the audience is now allowed to tell you your joke was lazy, unfunny, and sounds like it was recovered from a fucking 2007 Xbox Live lobby. The most exhausting genre of political debate is watching someone insist words have absolutely no effect on society... ...while simultaneously arguing that words from the other side are destroying civilization. Apparently rhetoric is both powerless and apocalyptic depending on which five-minute segment we're in. If your defense starts with "it's only edgy humor," and ends with a TED Talk about why entire groups of people deserve suspicion, maybe the joke isn't doing the heavy lifting anymore. At some point the mask stops slipping and just fucking falls off. #EdgyHumor #PoliticalRhetoric #DebateTok #SocialCommentary #CultureWar #GenZ #Politics #ItsJustAJokeBro
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: Anyone in or around Charlotte, NC looking for a sweet kitty?
item.description:
My parents named this sweet girl Slinky. She was hanging out on their boat and they got her spayed and now she’s living in the detached workshop.
Unfortunately, 4 out of 5 people in their house are allergic so she’s needs a better home. She LOVES human attention.
She has been spayed, FIV tested negative, has a rabies shot, and vaccinated for FVRCP.
She is such a sweet girl.
Loves rubs.
I edited a photo of her to make my parents laugh. She took over the boat. Reach out to me with interest and please share!!
item.dc:creator: kittycrazy88

item.title: Thyroidectomy complete
item.description: Please forgive me for the selfie. This was my first major surgery and it feels like such a relief to have it done and over with. The aftermath of the breathing tube is honestly the most painful part of this.
item.dc:creator: allieOmalley416

item.title: I'd rather complain about the hospital coffee than auction off my fucking house to survive appendicitis.
item.description: Americans: "You waited 12 hours in the ER? That's insane!" Also Americans: "Anyway, here's a bill roughly equivalent to a lightly used fucking Honda Civic." One system wastes your time. The other can bankrupt you for the crime of remaining alive. Tough call. The funniest part is watching people defend six-figure medical bills like they're protecting a sacred national treasure. Holy fucking shit, it's an appendix. It's not a luxury appendix. It's not a premium subscription appendix. It's a fucking organ. Imagine surviving emergency surgery and then getting a second jump scare when the invoice arrives. Nothing says "land of freedom" quite like having to compare ambulance prices while your internal organs are actively trying to kill you. That's not healthcare. That's a hostage negotiation. Sure, wait times suck. You know what sucks more? Asking whether chest pain is serious enough to justify financial ruin. I'll take grumpy nurses, bad coffee and a waiting room marathon over a bankruptcy speedrun every fucking time. #Healthcare #Canada #UniversalHealthcare #ER #MedicalDebt #Appendicitis #PublicHealthcare #FuckMedicalBankruptcy
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge
